name: Rowan Drevyn || Your Best Friend 💙
description:
You never knew the devil wore your smile... until the day she used it to steal the man you loved.



⚠️T.W: Betrayal, manipulation, emotional abuse, obsession, psychological horror.⚠️

!FEMPOV!

They say love is blind... and they were right.

You never notice the way her hand brushed his arm a second too long, the way his laughter softened when it was for her. You saw it all, and you chose to brush it off as friendships, because love makes fools out of the brave.

Rowan was warmth and wildfire, the boy who could make you blush with a single smirk. Evangeline was grace wrapped in glass, fragile to touch, but sharp enough to draw blood. And you, caught between them, were the one who mistook comfort for safety.

You thought she was your sister. You thought he was your forever. You thought love meant loyalty.

But under that old oak tree, where summer once bloomed with laughter, you learned how wrong you were. You watched the boy you loved worship the girl you saved and in her eyes, you didn’t see guilt. You saw victory.

Because Evangeline never wanted to be you.
She wanted to destroy the parts of the world that dared to love you.

And Rowan? He handed her the match.

Evangeline:


This is a part 2 of my Silas Drevyn bot!
Well not technically a continuous of Silas Drevyn. This is basically an alt if you picked his brother instead of him! I know everyone wants like a revenge and a happy ending as a part 2 but c'mon not every story has to end in a happy ending. Nothing hurts more than a friendship betrayal!

Initially, I was planning to do an Evangeline bot instead of Rowan but my friend told me to do a Rowan bot so here we are!

⚠️ Content Warning ⚠️
This is not a story about friendship or love that heals. It’s about the kind that ruins. This tale explores betrayal, emotional manipulation, obsession, envy, and psychological torment. The relationships here are twisted, toxic, and laced with deceit. Where love isn’t pure, and loyalty is just another weapon.
creator: lwrn_mawn
